sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Boston Omaha (NYSE: BOC) expands billboards, broadband and insurance
feed.summary: Boston Omaha Corporation (NYSE: BOC) reported its 2025 financial results, highlighting diversified growth across its billboard, broadband, and insurance segments, alongside a new share repurchase program. The company continues to invest in expanding its core businesses, operating thousands of billboards and serving nearly 50,000 broadband customers. Despite these expansions, Boston Omaha recorded net operating losses but is strategically focused on long-term capital allocation and identifying opportunities for sustainable earnings.

feed.title: BJ's Wholesale Club Holdings: Downgrade To Hold For The Near Term (NYSE:BJ)
feed.summary: BJ's Wholesale Club Holdings (BJ) has been downgraded to a "hold" rating due to an anticipated shift in focus towards investments rather than earnings growth in FY2026. While the company demonstrates improving membership quality and strong performance from new club openings, near-term adjusted EPS growth is expected to slow to low-to-mid-single digits. This slowdown is attributed to normalized merchandise inventory (MFI) growth and increased selling, general, and administrative (SG&A) investments.

feed.title: BKV (BKV) Chief Commercial Officer receives 20,732 restricted stock units
feed.summary: BKV Corp's Chief Commercial Officer, Dilanka Seimon, was granted 20,732 restricted stock units under the company’s 2024 Equity and Incentive Compensation Plan. These units, which vest in three equal annual installments starting March 10, 2027, tie his compensation to long-term company performance. Following this grant, Seimon's direct ownership in BKV increased to 57,245 shares of common stock, indicating a compensation-related acquisition.

feed.title: Affiliates sell BMBL Class A shares; BX Holdco entities report multi‑million proceeds (BMBL)
feed.summary: A recent SEC Form 144 filing reveals that affiliates of Bumble Inc. (BMBL), specifically several BX Buzz ML-n Holdco L.P. entities, have reported planned and past sales of Class A Common Stock. These sales, detailed with specific share counts and multi-million dollar proceeds for each entity, primarily occurred on March 17, 2026. The filing is a procedural document to ensure compliance with resale reporting requirements and also lists securities acquired in late 2025 that are intended for sale.

feed.title: Qumra backs Talkspace (TALK) sale to Universal Health Services with 5% stake
feed.summary: Qumra Capital and its affiliates have filed an amended Schedule 13D for Talkspace, Inc. (TALK), revealing a voting agreement that commits their 5% stake to support Talkspace's merger with Universal Health Services. This agreement solidifies Qumra's backing for the transaction, requiring them to vote in favor of the merger and against any alternative proposals. The filing details Qumra's beneficial ownership of Talkspace shares and outlines the terms under which the voting agreement will terminate.

feed.title: BioLineRx (BLRX) director discloses 2,055,000 option-linked shares
feed.summary: BioLineRx Ltd. director Cohen Gal Avraham has filed an initial ownership report detailing employee stock options for 2,055,000 ordinary shares. These options have an exercise price of $0.052 per share and expire on August 14, 2034, granted under the company’s 2003 Amended and Restated Share Incentive Plan. As of the grant date, 856,200 options were vested, with the remainder vesting in seven equal quarterly installments, subject to continued service.

feed.title: BRIEF-Bio Green Med Solution Inc Q4 Net Income USD -611 Thousand
feed.summary: Bio Green Med Solution Inc. reported a Q4 net income of -$611 Thousand. This brief announcement from Refinitiv provides a key financial update for the company. The article focuses solely on this financial figure without further elaboration.

feed.title: [Form 4] StubHub Holdings, Inc. Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Scott Michael Fitzgerald, Principal Accounting Officer at StubHub Holdings, Inc., reported the acquisition of 25,319 shares of Class A common stock through restricted stock units (RSUs). These RSUs were granted at no cost and will vest in four quarterly installments starting on March 31, 2026, increasing his direct holdings to 103,280 shares. The filing indicates a neutral impact and sentiment regarding this insider transaction.

feed.title: Assessing WOTC and EZEC Eligibility for Professional Employer Organizations: A Review of Barrett Business Services, Inc. v. Commissioner
feed.summary: This article reviews the case of "Barrett Business Services, Inc. v. Commissioner," where the Tax Court ruled on the eligibility of Professional Employer Organizations (PEOs) for the Work Opportunity Tax Credit (WOTC) and the Empowerment Zone Employment Credit (EZEC). The court determined that only common law employers, not statutory employers or agents, are entitled to these income tax credits. Barrett Business Services, a PEO, was denied these credits because it did not supervise the day-to-day activities of worksite employees, failing to meet the common law employer definition.

feed.title: Short Interest in Omnicom Group Inc. (NYSE:OMC) Declines By 13.1%
feed.summary: Omnicom Group Inc. (NYSE:OMC) saw a 13.1% decrease in short interest during March, totaling 40,589,387 shares as of March 13th, representing 13.2% of the stock sold short. The company recently approved a $5.0 billion share buyback and declared an $0.80 quarterly dividend, despite missing recent earnings expectations with $2.59 EPS versus $2.94 expected. Analysts currently rate the stock as a "Hold" with an average target price of $95.86.

feed.title: BlackRock stays No. 1 as Capital Group climbs in 2026 fund ranking
feed.summary: The 2026 U.S. Broadridge Fund Brand 50 report ranks BlackRock first for the second consecutive year, with Capital Group rising to second and Vanguard dropping to third. The report highlights that "Solidity," "Client-oriented thinking," and "Appealing investment strategy" are the most valued attributes by fund selectors. The study also noted a significant surge in active ETF launches (nearly 1,000 new funds) while mutual fund launches saw a 52% decline from 2024.

feed.title: BlackRock Retains Top Spot in the U.S. 2026 Broadridge Fund Brand 50 Report
feed.summary: BlackRock has maintained its position as the top asset management brand in the U.S. for the second consecutive year, according to Broadridge's 2026 Fund Brand 50 report. The report, which surveyed fund selectors' perceptions of brands based on ten attributes, highlighted "Solidity," "Client-oriented thinking," and "Appealing investment strategy" as the most valued attributes. Capital Group saw a significant rise to second place, while the study also noted a significant shift towards active ETF development over traditional mutual funds in 2025.

feed.title: The Best-Performing Fund Brands in Europe and Globally According to the 2026 Broadridge Fund Brand 50 Report
feed.summary: Broadridge's 2026 Fund Brand 50 (FB50) report reveals BlackRock maintains its top position globally and in most European markets, despite JPMorgan AM's brand score decline. The study highlights significant shifts in the asset management landscape, driven by geopolitical tensions, market volatility, and increasing investor interest in private equity, private debt, and innovative ETFs. Amundi, Schroders, and UBS also show notable brand strength improvements in the latest rankings.

feed.title: Short Interest in Sempra Energy (NYSE:SRE) Drops By 13.1%
feed.summary: Short interest in Sempra Energy (NYSE:SRE) has decreased by 13.1% as of March 13th, totaling 8,870,993 shares, which represents about 1.4% of shares and a short-interest ratio of 2.6 days. While short interest declined, insiders have recently purchased shares, with two directors acquiring a total of 3,500 shares. The company also raised its quarterly dividend and reported earnings that beat analyst estimates, although revenue slightly missed expectations.

feed.title: Ross Stores Inc. Stock: Off-Price Retail Leader Faces Insider Sales Amid Strong Momentum and Dividen
feed.summary: Ross Stores Inc. demonstrates strong fundamentals in off-price retail with impressive Q4 earnings, increased dividends, and a "Moderate Buy" analyst consensus. Despite insider sales, which may reflect personal financial planning, the company's business model, financial performance, and competitive standing position it as an appealing option for investors, particularly those seeking defensive qualities and exposure to U.S. consumer spending. The article highlights both the company's strengths and potential risks such as macroeconomic shifts and intensifying competition, advising vigilance from investors.

feed.title: Wells Fargo & Company (NYSE:WFC) Given Consensus Recommendation of "Moderate Buy" by Brokerages
feed.summary: Twenty-four analysts have issued a "Moderate Buy" consensus recommendation for Wells Fargo & Company (NYSE:WFC), with an average 12-month price target of $96.98. While there has been notable insider selling totaling $10.05 million in the last three months, institutional investors are accumulating shares, with Norges Bank purchasing a new $4.51 billion stake, and institutions now owning 75.9% of the company. The company recently reported Q4 earnings of $1.76 per share, beating estimates, and declared a quarterly dividend of $0.45 per share.

feed.title: Apple Inc. (NASDAQ:AAPL) Given Average Rating of "Moderate Buy" by Analysts
feed.summary: MarketBeat reports that thirty-six analysts have collectively given Apple Inc. (NASDAQ:AAPL) a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating, with an average 12-month target price of $297.58. Recent earnings exceeded expectations, driven by strong iPhone demand in China and potential AI-related announcements, though the stock faces risks from a tech-sector pullback and regulatory fines. The article also details Apple's latest financial results, dividend information, and institutional trading activity.

feed.title: Ulta Beauty Inc. (NASDAQ:ULTA) Given Consensus Recommendation of "Moderate Buy" by Analysts
feed.summary: Ulta Beauty Inc. (NASDAQ:ULTA) has received a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating from 27 analysts, with an average 12-month price target of $671.27. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating expectations with an EPS of $8.01 and revenue of $3.90 billion, and provided positive FY 2026 guidance. Institutional investors hold a significant 90.39% of the stock, reflecting confidence in the beauty retailer.

feed.title: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Company (NYSE:HPE) Given Average Recommendation of "Moderate Buy" by Brokerages
feed.summary: Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE:HPE) has received a "Moderate Buy" recommendation from twenty brokerages, with an average 12-month target price of $26.50. Despite positive analyst ratings and exceeding quarterly EPS estimates, company insiders, including CEO Antonio Neri, sold a significant number of shares in the last 90 days. The company reported strong revenue growth of 18.4% year-over-year and issued optimistic FY2026 guidance.

feed.title: Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. (NYSE:HLT) Receives Consensus Recommendation of "Moderate Buy" from Analysts
feed.summary: Twenty-four analysts have issued a "Moderate Buy" consensus recommendation for Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. (NYSE:HLT), with an average 12-month price target of $326.18. Key points include strong Q4 earnings, positive FY2026 guidance, and recent insider selling activity.

feed.title: The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. (NYSE:GS) Receives Consensus Recommendation of "Hold" from Analysts
feed.summary: The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. (NYSE:GS) has received a consensus "Hold" recommendation from 22 analysts, with an average 12-month target price of $919.29. Insiders sold over $112 million worth of shares in the last quarter, though the company recently beat quarterly earnings estimates and increased its dividend. The article also provides a detailed overview of recent analyst ratings, insider transactions, institutional holdings, and key news impacting the company.

feed.title: Global Payments Inc. (NYSE:GPN) Receives Consensus Rating of "Hold" from Analysts
feed.summary: Global Payments Inc. (NYSE:GPN) has received a consensus "Hold" rating from 25 analysts, with an average 12-month target price of $91.18. The company recently beat quarterly EPS estimates and issued positive FY 2026 guidance, while trading at a relatively low valuation. Institutional investors and hedge funds own a significant portion of the company's shares.

feed.title: HCA Healthcare, Inc. (NYSE:HCA) Given Average Rating of "Moderate Buy" by Analysts
feed.summary: HCA Healthcare, Inc. (NYSE:HCA) has received an average "Moderate Buy" rating from analysts, with 16 out of 25 firms issuing a buy rating. The average 1-year price target is $537.73, and several firms have recently increased their price targets. The company recently beat quarterly earnings estimates, provided strong FY2026 guidance, and increased its quarterly dividend, despite some insider selling.

feed.title: Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOGL) Receives Consensus Recommendation of "Moderate Buy" from Brokerages
feed.summary: Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOGL) has received a "Moderate Buy" consensus recommendation from 51 brokerages, with an average one-year price target of $368.06. Several firms have raised their price targets, citing AI developments like TurboQuant which could reduce infrastructure costs and boost margins. However, near-term risks include significant insider selling, a YouTube negligence verdict, and portfolio sales by Ark Invest, which could increase volatility.

feed.title: Delta Air Lines, Inc. (NYSE:DAL) Given Consensus Rating of "Moderate Buy" by Brokerages
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines (NYSE:DAL) has received a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating from 25 brokerages, with an average 12-month price target of $78.80. This follows the company's Q4 earnings where EPS beat expectations but revenue fell short, leading to Q1 2026 and FY 2026 EPS guidance. Recent insider sales amount to approximately 620,550 shares, valued at around $44.1 million, and the company announced a quarterly dividend of $0.1875 per share.

feed.title: Charles River Laboratories Stock: A Key Player in Drug Discovery Services for North American Investo
feed.summary: Charles River Laboratories International, Inc. (NYSE: CRL) is a cornerstone in the contract research organization (CRO) sector, providing essential research services for drug discovery and development. The company operates through three segments: Research Models and Services, Discovery and Safety Assessment, and Manufacturing Solutions. It holds a strong competitive position with a market capitalization of $9.70 billion, offering North American investors defensive growth within healthcare allocations.

feed.title: Japan Post Insurance Invests in KKR’s Hoken Minaoshi Hompo Group
feed.summary: Japan Post Insurance has acquired a minority stake in Hoken Minaoshi Hompo Group, a leading Japanese insurance distributor, which was first acquired by KKR in 2025. This investment aims to accelerate Hoken Minaoshi Hompo Group's growth through organic expansion and acquisitions, and foster collaboration, including the establishment of an outbound call center for Japan Post Insurance. The partnership deepens the existing strategic relationship between Japan Post Insurance and KKR, and is expected to enhance value for all three companies.

feed.title: Blackstone Is Said to Plan $500 Million India IPO for AGS Health
feed.summary: Blackstone Inc. is reportedly planning a $500 million initial public offering (IPO) for its AGS Health Pvt. unit in Mumbai. The private equity firm has initiated discussions with investment banks and is expected to appoint advisors shortly. The IPO will likely comprise both primary shares and secondary sales from existing investors.

feed.title: Rosen Law Firm Encourages Barclays PLC Investors to Inquire About Securities Class Action Investigation - BCS
feed.summary: The Rosen Law Firm is investigating potential securities claims against Barclays PLC following allegations that the company issued misleading business information. This investigation stems from a Reuters article reporting Barclays' significant exposure to the collapsed UK mortgage provider Market Financial Solutions Ltd, which caused a drop in Barclays' American Depositary Shares. Investors who purchased Barclays securities are encouraged to contact the law firm to learn about joining a prospective class action for potential compensation.

feed.title: Brookfield Business Partners L.P. (NYSE:BBU) Short Interest Up 24.3% in March
feed.summary: Brookfield Business Partners L.P. (NYSE:BBU) experienced a 24.3% increase in short interest during March, reaching 66,186 shares as of March 13th. This represents 0.1% of shares outstanding with a days-to-cover ratio of 1.5. Despite a significant Q4 earnings miss, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average price target of $43, and institutional ownership remains high.

feed.title: BEAM (NASDAQ: BEAM) insider schedules 25,000-share sale after option exercise
feed.summary: An insider at Beam Therapeutics Inc. (NASDAQ: BEAM) has scheduled the sale of 25,000 shares after exercising stock options, as indicated by a Rule 144 SEC filing. The filing also notes previous sales by John M. Evans on January 29 and January 30, 2026, each involving 25,000 shares for a total of $734,582.50 and $708,947.50 respectively. This transaction is a routine compliance filing related to the resale of securities following an option exercise.

feed.title: Grupo Aval Acciones Y Valores SA - ADR (AVAL) Stock Price Quote Today & Current Price Chart
feed.summary: This page provides current trading information for Grupo Aval Acciones Y Valores SA - ADR (AVAL), including its stock price quote, key statistics like previous close, open, and 1-year change, and details for CFD trading. It also highlights recent articles related to shares like NVIDIA, Tesla, Siemens Energy, and BYD. feed.title: Hyperscale Data to acquire 48.5 acres in Michigan for expansion
feed.summary: Hyperscale Data, an AI data center company, announced its subsidiary Alliance Cloud Services will acquire 48.5 acres in southwest Michigan, more than doubling its current acreage to support complex computing infrastructure. The acquisition is part of its long-term strategy to expand its footprint and increase the capacity of its artificial intelligence data center. The City of Dowagiac, where Hyperscale Data currently operates, stated they have not yet received formal expansion plans or information on the location of the new property from the company.

feed.title: Aspire Biopharma's Wholly Owned Subsidiary, Buzz Bomb Caffeine Company, Partners with Blue Shark Beverages to Expand Southern California Distribution
feed.summary: Aspire Biopharma's subsidiary, Buzz Bomb Caffeine Company, has forged a strategic distribution partnership with Blue Shark Beverages to expand its retail presence in Southern California. This collaboration will introduce BUZZ BOMB™, a proprietary sublingual caffeine stick pack, to markets including Palm Springs, Los Angeles, and San Diego, targeting the growing "better-for-you" energy market. The partnership aims to leverage Blue Shark's established network to meet increasing consumer demand for functional, health-conscious fitness supplements.

feed.title: Ascendis Pharma Expands Share Capital Following March 30 Warrant Exercises
feed.summary: Ascendis Pharma (ASND) has increased its nominal share capital by DKK 399,438 to DKK 62,376,846 following the closure of its warrant exercise window on March 30, 2026. This resulted in the issuance of 399,438 new shares at an average cash consideration of approximately $92.10 per share. While modestly diluting existing shareholders, the move strengthens the company's equity base, prompting updates to its articles of association.

feed.title: Ascendis Pharma (NASDAQ: ASND) adds shares after warrant exercises
feed.summary: Ascendis Pharma A/S reported the closing of an exercise window for warrants linked to its ordinary shares, leading to a registered share capital increase of DKK 399,438. The company issued 399,438 new ordinary shares at an average cash consideration of approximately USD $92.10 per share. Consequently, Ascendis Pharma amended its articles of association to reflect the updated total share capital of DKK 62,376,846.

feed.title: Ohio solar campus expands with 30,000-square-foot HQ, test site
feed.summary: ARRAY Technologies announced that its subsidiary, APA Solar, has opened a new 30,000 square foot headquarters on its manufacturing campus in Ridgeville Corners, Ohio. This expansion includes a Foundations Center of Excellence and a 5-acre solar testing site, aimed at strengthening domestic manufacturing and integrated tracker-foundation solutions. The new facility is designed to foster collaboration, shorten development cycles, and reinforce long-term investment in U.S. operations and local jobs for the utility-scale solar market.

feed.title: Assembly Biosciences (ASMB) boosts CEO bonus target in 2026 plan
feed.summary: Assembly Biosciences (ASMB) has adopted a new 2026 Corporate Bonus Plan, effective January 1, 2026, designed to motivate and reward employees with performance-based cash bonuses. The plan outlines varying target bonus opportunities, up to 75% of base salary for the CEO, and distinguishes between corporate and individual objectives. Notably, the Compensation Committee also increased CEO Jason A. Okazaki’s bonus target from 60% to 65% of his base salary for fiscal 2026.

feed.title: iShares Future AI & Tech ETF (ARTY) Stock Price Quote Today & Current Price Chart
feed.summary: This article provides current trading information and key statistics for the iShares Future AI & Tech ETF (ARTY), which tracks the NYSE FactSet Global Robotics and Artificial Intelligence Index. It details CFD trading conditions, including spreads, overnight funding adjustments, and margin requirements. The page also features recent articles related to major tech stocks like Amazon, Siemens, Microsoft, and HENSOLDT, and includes customer testimonials for Capital.com.

feed.title: Auddia to execute 1-for-7.7 reverse stock split; shares down
feed.summary: Auddia (AUUD) announced it will execute a 1-for-7.7 reverse stock split of its common stock, effective at 5:00 p.m. ET on April 1, 2026. The company's shares were down 6.25% in premarket trading following the news. The reverse split aims to increase the per share trading price to regain compliance with Nasdaq's minimum bid price requirement.

feed.title: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. Reminds Aquestive Therapeutics, Inc. Investors with Significant Losses to Contact the Firm Before Upcoming Lead Plaintiff Deadline
feed.summary: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. has announced a class action lawsuit against Aquestive Therapeutics, Inc. for investors who purchased securities between June 16, 2025, and January 8, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Aquestive gave a false impression about the approval of its New Drug Application for Anaphylm, leading to a significant stock price drop after deficiencies were identified by the FDA. Investors who suffered losses have until May 4, 2026, to apply for lead plaintiff in the lawsuit.

feed.title: AGG ETF Climbs 0.5%
feed.summary: The AGG ETF (iShares Core U.S. Aggregate Bond ETF) saw a 0.5% increase in its value. The article does not provide further details or context for this gain.

feed.title: Aprea Therapeutics (Nasdaq: APRE) secures $30M and reports WEE1 trial response
feed.summary: Aprea Therapeutics has secured approximately $30 million in gross proceeds through an oversubscribed private placement, extending its cash runway into Q1 2028. The company also reported positive clinical data from its Phase 1 ACESOT-1051 trial for WEE1 inhibitor APR-1051, showing a confirmed partial response in PPP2R1A-mutated endometrial cancer and generally manageable safety. This financing and promising trial data reinforce Aprea's commitment to developing targeted therapies for biomarker-defined cancers.

feed.title: Abercrombie & Fitch (NYSE: ANF) CEO awarded 290,904 shares as stock grant
feed.summary: Abercrombie & Fitch CEO Fran Horowitz received a grant of 290,904 shares of Class A Common Stock as equity compensation on March 26, 2026. Simultaneously, 128,289 shares were disposed of to cover tax obligations. After these transactions, Horowitz directly owns 517,793 shares, increasing her equity stake in the company.

feed.title: Abercrombie & Fitch (ANF) EVP awarded 70,522 shares; 34,832 withheld for taxes
feed.summary: Abercrombie & Fitch (ANF) EVP Samir Desai was awarded 70,522 shares of Class A Common Stock as compensation. Concurrently, 34,832 shares were withheld at a price of $89.76 per share to cover tax obligations. Following these transactions, Desai directly owns 99,625 shares of Class A Common Stock.

feed.title: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC Announces an Investigation Against Insulet Corporation (PODD) and Encourages Shareholders to Learn More About the Investigation
feed.summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC has launched an investigation into Insulet Corporation (NASDAQ:PODD) following a significant drop in its stock price after the company disclosed a voluntary Medical Device Correction for specific lots of its Omnipod® 5 Pods due to a manufacturing issue. The firm is encouraging shareholders who purchased Insulet securities to learn more about the investigation to potentially recover losses. This investigation seeks to determine if there are grounds for a class action on behalf of affected investors stemming from the alleged manufacturing issue and subsequent stock decline.

feed.title: Hormel Foods Transforms Supply Chain via o9 AI Integration
feed.summary: Hormel Foods has partnered with o9 Solutions and Accenture to implement an AI-powered Digital Brain platform across its 70 global sites. This integration aims to enhance supply chain agility, efficiency, and planning capabilities by replacing disconnected tools with a unified enterprise model. The new system leverages AI and machine learning for improved forecasting, better demand-supply matching, and streamlined inventory and deployment decisions, especially critical for Hormel's complex global network.

feed.title: Microsoft Deepens Thailand Partnership with more than US$1 billion Investment, Spanning Technology, Trust, and Talent
feed.summary: Microsoft is investing over US$1 billion in Thailand between 2026 and 2028 to boost its cloud and AI infrastructure, expand its partnership with the Royal Thai Government, and support the country's AI-powered future. This investment, part of the "Advancing National Growth, Prosperity, and Global Competitiveness with AI" initiative, focuses on technology, trust, and talent development. The effort aims to skill millions of Thai citizens, build world-class infrastructure, and establish a secure digital foundation for the nation.

feed.title: Republic Services, Inc. (NYSE:RSG) Given Consensus Recommendation of "Moderate Buy" by Analysts
feed.summary: Republic Services, Inc. (NYSE:RSG) has received a "Moderate Buy" consensus recommendation from analysts, with an average 12-month price target of $246.40. The company recently reported Q4 EPS of $1.76, beating estimates, and set FY2026 EPS guidance at $7.20-$7.28. RSG also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.625, representing an annualized yield of 1.1%.

feed.title: A new onsemi power module lifts solar inverter output to 350 kW
feed.summary: onsemi has secured a design win with Sineng Electric, providing its FS7 IGBT + EliteSiC hybrid power integrated modules (PIMs) for Sineng's 430 kW liquid-cooled energy storage systems and 320 kW utility-scale solar inverters. This integration is expected to boost efficiency by up to 0.1%, increase power density by 32%, and reduce switching losses and thermal resistance. These improvements enable higher system ratings, allowing a solar inverter's output to increase from 320 kW to 350 kW without a larger footprint, ultimately contributing to a more stable and reliable renewable energy grid.
